overall.description: Third-person gameplay footage from Cyberpunk 2077 showing a character walking through a massive elevated highway construction site in a desert urban environment. The scene features industrial steel frameworks, yellow construction cranes, concrete support pillars, and scattered pedestrians under bright midday sun with mountains visible in the distance.

events.description: black sedan drives past on the left side of the street
character moves from sidewalk onto open area under the construction

agents.ego_description: walking steadily along the sidewalk beneath the massive elevated construction structure

notable_agents.action: pedestrian in brown tank top walking away from the camera
black sedan driving along the street parallel to the sidewalk

entered.detail: massive steel beam and concrete highway structure under construction spanning the scene
large yellow crane working on the elevated deck structure
thick cylindrical concrete pillars supporting the elevated highway
metal security fencing along the construction perimeter
tall palm trees visible in the distance against the blue sky

segments.scene_description: The character walks along a concrete sidewalk beneath a massive elevated highway construction site. Industrial steel frameworks and yellow cranes dominate the right side, while palm trees are visible in the distant left. A black sedan drives past on the street, and a pedestrian in a tank top walks ahead of the camera.

scene_state.functional_zone: open construction zone with traffic barriers and scaffolding

events.description: character turns left to navigate through construction barriers and scaffolding
moving from shaded area under construction to sunlit section with distant mountains visible

agents.ego_description: turning left and walking through the open construction area, navigating around barriers and equipment

notable_agents.action: pedestrian in dark clothing walking across the construction zone toward the left

entered.detail: yellow and black striped concrete barriers blocking off construction zones
metal scaffolding attached to the concrete support pillars
scattered construction materials and wooden pallets along the fence line

segments.scene_description: The character turns left into an open area beneath the construction, navigating around yellow and black traffic barriers. Metal scaffolding clings to the concrete pillars as the camera moves through the industrial zone. The lighting shifts as the character moves into a sunlit section with views of distant mountains through the steel framework.

scene_state.functional_zone: city street ascending hill flanked by construction pillars

events.description: beginning to ascend the inclined street between rows of construction pillars
waiting at traffic light at the top of the hill as vehicles pass by

agents.ego_description: walking uphill along the street between massive concrete construction pillars, approaching the intersection

notable_agents.action: pedestrian in red jacket and white hat walking toward the camera
dark SUV driving up the hill past the construction site

entered.detail: arid desert mountains visible through the gaps in the construction framework
wooden pallets stacked along the construction fencing

segments.scene_description: The character ascends a hill flanked by massive concrete pillars supporting the elevated highway. The street is lined with stacked pallets and construction materials. A pedestrian in a red jacket approaches from the opposite direction while a dark SUV drives up the hill. Distant desert mountains become visible through the steel framework ahead.

scene_state.functional_zone: intersection with desert road and mountain backdrop

events.description: exiting the dense construction zone into open desert intersection with clear mountain views
crossing the street at the intersection as a blue SUV waits at the traffic light

agents.ego_description: crossing the intersection and entering the open desert road area with palm trees and mountain views

notable_agents.action: blue SUV turning right at the intersection
pedestrian in orange top walking along the sidewalk away from camera

entered.detail: red rectangular street sign with white text reading Pheasant mounted on a pole
traffic signal pole showing red light at the intersection
open asphalt road leading into desert landscape with scattered palm trees
derelict building with green roof near the intersection corner

segments.scene_description: The character exits the construction zone into a wide-open desert intersection. A red street sign reading 'Pheasant' marks the corner as the character crosses the road. The environment opens up to reveal desert mountains, palm trees lining the road, and an abandoned structure. A blue SUV waits at the traffic light as the character enters the open desert road.

merged_segments.scene_description: The shot follows a continuous camera movement from a crowded urban sidewalk into the open, industrial heart of a massive highway construction site. It begins with the character walking beneath towering steel frameworks and yellow cranes, passing a black sedan and a pedestrian as palm trees line the distant horizon. As the character turns left, the scene shifts from the street to an open zone where the camera navigates around yellow and black traffic barriers. The perspective then moves deeper into the industrial area, passing metal scaffolding clinging to concrete pillars before emerging into a bright, sunlit section. Finally, the view expands through the steel structures to reveal a clear sightline toward distant mountains under the midday sun.

The shot follows a continuous camera movement that transitions from a confined industrial construction zone into a wide-open desert landscape. It begins as the character ascends a hill flanked by massive concrete pillars and stacked construction materials, passing a pedestrian in a red jacket and a dark SUV. As the camera moves forward, the view through the steel framework gradually reveals distant desert mountains. The scene then opens up as the character exits the construction zone and crosses a road marked by a red Pheasant street sign, shifting from the industrial corridor to a bright intersection. Finally, the environment expands further to reveal palm trees and an abandoned structure, with the camera following the character onto an open desert road beside a waiting blue SUV.
